chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 813 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.1 2. For orders on CMA No.1172/2018 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.1173/2018 11.11.2025 Mr. Madan Lal, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2017 and remains listed for orders on office objection. On 03.11.2017 and 15.01.2018 time was sought in such regard and same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
